description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Mentioning the city of Maḥalla al-Kubrā; Abū l-Ḥasan; and Abū l-Munā Tiqva ha-Levi (possibly the same as the one mentioned in T-S 12.683 and Bodl. MS heb. c 13/1). (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
